summary: Iteration 15 testing complete. All 5 new features verified working: (1) BlogAdmin tab in admin panel - renders article list with 6 articles, (2) Video reviews admin - renders settings form with title/subtitle/items, (3) B2B admin - renders settings form with hero/benefits/CTA sections, (4) WhatsApp admin - renders settings form with enable toggle/phone/messages, (5) B2B page at /b2b - loads with hero, 4 benefits, contact form. WhatsApp floating button visible on all pages. Video reviews section on /sauny correctly hidden (no videos added). FAQ expanded: 13 sauna items, 11 balia items. All 14 backend API tests passed.

issues: Group starts expanded by default, first click collapses it, second click expands. Minor UX inconsistency with other groups.

passed_tests: API: GET /api/health returns healthy status
API: GET /api/settings/video-reviews returns default settings
API: GET /api/admin/settings/video-reviews requires auth (401) and returns settings with auth
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/video-reviews updates and persists settings
API: GET /api/settings/b2b returns default settings with 4 benefits
API: GET /api/admin/settings/b2b requires auth (401) and returns settings with auth
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/b2b updates and persists settings
API: GET /api/settings/whatsapp returns enabled=true with phone number
API: GET /api/admin/settings/whatsapp requires auth (401) and returns settings with auth
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/whatsapp updates and persists settings
API: GET /api/settings/faq returns 13 items
API: GET /api/settings/balia-faq returns 11 items
API: GET /api/admin/blog/articles requires auth (401) and returns articles list
API: POST /api/contact with type='b2b' works correctly
FRONTEND: Admin login works with admin/220066
FRONTEND: BlogAdmin tab ('Статьи' in БЛОГ group) renders article list with 6 articles
FRONTEND: SaunaVideoReviewsAdmin tab ('Видео-обзоры' in ГЛОБАЛЬНЫЕ group) renders settings form
FRONTEND: WhatsAppAdmin tab ('WhatsApp' in ГЛОБАЛЬНЫЕ group) renders settings form
FRONTEND: B2BAdmin tab ('Настройки B2B' in B2B group) renders settings form
FRONTEND: B2B page (/b2b) loads with hero section, title 'Współpraca B2B'
FRONTEND: B2B page has 4 benefit items
FRONTEND: B2B page has contact form
FRONTEND: WhatsApp floating button visible on main landing (/)
FRONTEND: WhatsApp floating button visible on B2B page (/b2b)
FRONTEND: WhatsApp floating button visible on sauny page (/sauny)
FRONTEND: Video reviews section NOT visible on /sauny (no videos added - expected)
FRONTEND: B2B navigation link visible in main landing header
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPanel.jsx correctly imports and renders BlogAdmin, SaunaVideoReviewsAdmin, B2BAdmin, WhatsAppAdmin components
AdminPanel.jsx tabGroups correctly defines 'blog' group with 'blog_articles' tab, 'b2b_group' with 'b2b' tab, 'global' group with 'whatsapp' and 'video_reviews' tabs
renderTab() switch-case correctly maps tab IDs to components
B2BPage.jsx correctly fetches /api/settings/b2b and renders hero, benefits grid, contact form
WhatsAppButton.jsx correctly fetches /api/settings/whatsapp and renders floating button with 1.5s animation delay
SaunaVideoReviews.jsx correctly only renders when data.items.length > 0
App.js correctly includes /b2b route and WhatsAppButton global component
Backend server.py has correct models: SaunaVideoReviewsSettings, B2BSettings, WhatsAppSettings
Backend has correct admin endpoints with auth: /api/admin/settings/video-reviews, /api/admin/settings/b2b, /api/admin/settings/whatsapp
seed_data_creation: Test B2B contact form submitted via POST /api/contact with type='b2b'. Video reviews and B2B settings temporarily modified and restored during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested all 5 new features: (1) BlogAdmin at admin-tab-blog_articles in БЛОГ group - shows 6 articles, (2) SaunaVideoReviewsAdmin at admin-tab-video_reviews in ГЛОБАЛЬНЫЕ group - currently 0 videos, (3) B2BAdmin at admin-tab-b2b in B2B group - 4 default benefits, (4) WhatsAppAdmin at admin-tab-whatsapp in ГЛОБАЛЬНЫЕ group - enabled by default with phone +48732099201, (5) B2B page at /b2b with hero/benefits/contact form. WhatsApp floating button appears on all pages after 1.5s delay. Video reviews section on /sauny only appears when videos exist. FAQ has 13 sauna items and 11 balia items. Note: БЛОГ group in admin sidebar starts expanded, first click collapses it.

blog_admin_tab.details: BlogAdmin component renders with 6 articles, 'Новая статья' button, edit/delete functionality

video_reviews_admin.details: SaunaVideoReviewsAdmin renders with title/subtitle fields, 'Добавить видео' button, currently 0 videos

b2b_admin.details: B2BAdmin renders with hero section, 4 benefits, CTA section with phone/email

whatsapp_admin.details: WhatsAppAdmin renders with enable toggle, phone number, default messages, button preview

b2b_page.details: B2B page at /b2b loads with hero 'Współpraca B2B', 4 benefits, contact form

whatsapp_floating_button.details: Green WhatsApp button visible in bottom-left corner on all pages (main, sauny, balie, b2b, blog)

video_reviews_section.details: Section correctly hidden on /sauny when no videos added (expected behavior)

b2b_navigation_link.details: B2B link visible in main landing header navigation

faq_expanded.details: Sauna FAQ has 13 items, Balia FAQ has 11 items
